personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Engineer | Next.js, TypeScript & AI
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Full-Stack Engineer with 3+ years of experience architecting highly scalable B2B/B2C SaaS platforms using Next.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. Specialist in AI workflow integrations (RAG, LLM Orchestration) and system optimization, with a proven track record of reducing system latency by 60% and increasing conversion rates by 5%. Adept at driving technical initiatives, enforcing Clean Architecture and SOLID standards, and mentoring engineering teams to accelerate delivery.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Available for immediate start.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer
responsibilities: Spearheaded company-wide TypeScript adoption initiative, establishing strict Clean Architecture and SOLID standards that decreased code review turnaround by 40% and reduced post-release bugs by 60%.
Led migration from legacy PHP to modern decoupled stack (Next.js/Node.js), identifying high-impact features that improved scalability by 300% and reduced mean time to deployment from days to hours.
Presented technical decisions to C-level stakeholders, translating complex performance optimizations (30% faster responses, 5% conversion increase) into strategic business value language.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
responsibilities: Architected and deployed three production-grade SaaS platforms from concept to deployment: Lexity (AI language learning), ZIRO.FIT (B2B2C fitness marketplace), and Interly (voice-based interview coaching).
Engineered high-throughput data layers using Raw SQL aggregations (json_agg, LATERAL JOINs), slashing dashboard database load times by 60% and driving a 5% increase in user conversion rates.
Built fault-tolerant LLM executor with custom API key rotation and exponential backoffRetry logic, maintaining 99.9% uptime against strict rate limits.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Docker and Vercel, reducing deployment cycles from manual processes to automated zero-downtime releases.
Established E2E testing frameworks with Playwright, catching critical regressions before production and reducing bug leak rate by 70%.

experience.title: Independent Full-Stack Developer
responsibilities: Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch using Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL—demonstrating rapid skill acquisition in modern full-stack development.
Delivered production-ready PHP/Laravel backend solutions for international clients, implementing SQL optimizations that reduced query execution times by 40%.
Self-directed learning roadmap transitioning from radio-electronics background to TypeScript/AI development, achieving proficiency in under 12 months.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer (Apprenticeship)
responsibilities: Developed and shipped production-ready features for enterprise client projects within high-velocity Agile/Scrum environments, collaborating closely with senior engineers to maintain code quality standards.
Contributed to large-scale legacy system migrations, participating in daily stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
Applied rigorous code review practices, learning production code best practices that later became foundation for mentoring junior developers.

projects.name: Lexity: Multimodal AI Ecosystem
projects.description: High-performance AI platform featuring SM-2 algorithms, RAG, and AES-256-GCM encryption. Supports 10,000+ active users with sub-second AI response latency (avg 450ms). Deployed on Vercel edge functions with Redis caching.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, Redis, Composite AI Orchestration

projects.name: Interly: Real-time AI Coaching
projects.description: Voice-interactive platform analyzing STAR method metrics via Web Audio API and LLMs. Real-time feedback for interview preparation serving 500+ daily practice sessions. Integrated with Playwright E2E testing pipeline.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, Zustand, Web Audio API, Google Speech-to-Text, PostgreSQL

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: B2B2C Fitness Marketplace
projects.description: SaaS marketplace with Stripe Connect subscriptions, Leaflet geospatial search, and high-performance real-time analytics dashboard. Processing $50K+ monthly GMV across 200+ trainers.
projects.stack: Laravel, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe Connect, Vercel KV

education.degree: Diploma of Technician in Radio-electronics (equivalent to Bachelor's degree)
education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
